holdings.infoBox: MSSS is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Monarch Select Subsector ETF Fund (MSSS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Monarch Select Subsector index. The fund is a fund-of-funds that tracks an index of 10 US-listed ETFs that are selected for its sector or subsector that can take advantage of a particular phase in an economic cycle. MSSS was launched on Mar 6, 2024 and is issued by Monarch.
